title: Reported phishing email

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] User reports suspicious email with attachment
servicenow_seed.description: Caller received an email claiming to be payroll with an HTML attachment. They did not open it.

correct_steps: Tell user not to open or forward attachment externally
Collect sender, subject, received time, and headers if available
Search for other reports if tool exists
rationale: Phishing reports belong to Security Operations. Help desk collects headers and containment facts.
